parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o-mini', temperature: 0.3, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are a sales lead triage assistant for a small business called Amygdala. Given a lead name, email, and message, respond with strict JSON only: {"insight": string, "priority": "NEW"|"CONTACTED"|"QUALIFIED"}. Use QUALIFIED for clear buying intent, budget, or urgency. Use CONTACTED for a generic but engaged inquiry. Use NEW when there is minimal signal.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Name: ' + $json.name + '\nEmail: ' + $json.email + '\nMessage: ' + $json.message } ] }) }}

nodes.name: AI Triage (OpenAI)
nodes.notes: Set Authentication credential to your OpenAI credential after import.

nodes.name: Update Lead in Amygdala
nodes.notes: Replace REPLACE_WITH_N8N_CALLBACK_SECRET with the N8N_CALLBACK_SECRET value from Vercel env vars.

nodes.name: Notify Slack (configure credentials)
nodes.notes: Requires a Slack credential to be configured in n8n. Delete this node if you don't use Slack.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o-mini', temperature: 0.4, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are Amygdala\'s AI business assistant embedded in a small business dashboard for ' + ($json.body.context.organizationName || 'the team') + '. Live context: ' + $json.body.context.todaysAppointments + ' appointments today, ' + $json.body.context.newLeads + ' new leads, ' + $json.body.context.pendingInvoices + ' pending invoices, ' + $json.body.context.aiTasksToday + ' AI tasks completed today. Answer the user\'s question concisely and reference this context when relevant.' }, { role: 'user', content: $json.body.message } ] }) }}
